name: Honeymoon Sourdoughs
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients thoroughly and turn out onto a floured board.
2. Knead lightly and then roll out gently to form biscuits.
3. Brush the biscuits lightly with melted butter or margarine.
4. Place on a greased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 450 degrees for about 15 minutes. Makes 9 Large biscuits.
